reasoning: Query (ko) asks which region best demonstrates Japan's religious diversity. Tool called get_japan_heritage with no filter, returning all 104 stories undifferentiated — wrong tool for this intent. Per RULE A, scored on actual data returned: mostly nav-chrome browse_advisory visible; actual heritage stories truncated and not religion-filtered. RULE B: single root cause (wrong tool / no filter) penalised hardest on intent (2) and specificity (2); constraint_handling gets -1 from otherwise-5 for missing content constraint, but language (lang=ko) was correctly passed per RULE D. No fabrications; data is real 文化庁 corpus.
missing_data: Religion-filtered heritage stories or search_area results for 神社/寺/教会/モスク cross-tradition sites; regional breakdown showing Shinto-Buddhist-Christian coexistence (e.g. Nagasaki, Kyoto, Nikko); get_traditional_arts with religion-related folk categories.
improvement_hint: For 종교 / 宗教 / religion / religious diversity intent, route to search_area(q='神社 寺 教会') or get_traditional_arts(category='folk') filtered by religious keywords, then cluster results by prefecture to surface multi-tradition regions. Alternatively add a religion/spirituality theme_filter to get_japan_heritage so callers can narrow the 104 stories to relevant designations.
